_comment: Two adjacent cube faces beveled with group=true. Adjacent selected faces share new vertices on their shared boundary, AND their internal shared edge is removed → one connected inset L-shaped region. At shared corners (endpoints of the dropped internal edge) vibe3d uses MODO's accumulated-shift semantics: each face contributes its shift along its own normal, plus inset along its non-shared adjacent edges. Bit-for-bit match against MODO 9.
